finding_results.notes: Four passages now achieve dual-register prose (funny and devastating simultaneously): (1) Line 11 — the refrigerator coefficient is pushed into dark comedy by confirming the system quantified a kitchen appliance's strategic importance and 'the number was not zero'; (2) Line 131 — the Administrative Coordination portal's preserved interface is compared to 'a landlord who never repaints,' making the observation genuinely funny while the subtext (the designers it replaced) remains painful; (3) Line 141 — the nine-minute response farce is grounded by the turmeric comparison, making the temporal disproportion land as comedy rather than only analytical observation; (4) Line 155 — the 'sustained' reversal now holds a dark comic beat ('She almost laughed. It was — and she hated herself for thinking it — elegant') before devastation lands. No comedy deflects from the chapter's arc; each beat sharpens the absurdity-pain coexistence.

Both emotional peaks now include specific breaks in Mira's composed register. At the 'locally optimal' peak (line 105): syntactic rupture ('Something in her chest went tight, then hot. She gripped the sink.'), pressurized profanity ('Fuck your locally optimal' — arriving as an internal event, pressurized and specific per the style bible), and violent metaphor ('the clean specific fury'), followed by the strategist's reassembly into analytical counting. At the 'sustained' peak (line 161): physical violence ('Something behind her sternum burned, hot and chemical'), fragmentary syntax ('The spreadsheet. The footnote. The 4,811 characters.'), and raw despair ('What was any of it for') before the going-quiet that follows. The profanity at line 105 functions as the 'event' the style bible specifies — it is the single pressurized crack in Mira's composure across the chapter.

All four tracking number instances updated from 2024 to 2029: GM-TR-2029-00891 (lines 53, 97) and AC-OBJ-2029-14077 (lines 143, 151). The year prefix now aligns with the continuity sheet's 'approximately 2029' timeline. No other year references in the chapter were affected (the 2019 data-room reference on line 29 is a genuine historical date and remains unchanged).

Two embodied details integrated into the protocol-research passage at line 29, in addition to the existing Theo moment (tab-closing at line 31): (1) 'her bare feet on the cold kitchen floor, the table's edge pressing a line into her forearms' — physical sensation (touch) and Mira's body in space, woven into the existing 'She worked for two hours' sentence; (2) 'Twice the refrigerator clicked behind her — its forty-minute interval, the apartment counting time while she read' — environmental sensory input (sound), added as one new sentence. The passage increased by one sentence total (well within the three-sentence limit). The refrigerator click also seeds the forty-minute interval that recurs at line 173, strengthening the motif.
Typo corrected: 'unchassified' changed to 'unclassified' at line 81. No other changes to the sentence.

summary: All five findings addressed and fixed. The HIGH-severity continuity defect (ch06-craft-03, tracking number years) was corrected across all four instances. The two MEDIUM craft findings targeting emotional register (ch06-craft-01, dark comedy; ch06-craft-02, stress response) were resolved together: four passages now achieve dual-register comedy-devastation, and both emotional peaks include specific breaks in Mira's analytical composure — including pressurized profanity at the 'locally optimal' moment. The embodied-detail finding (ch06-craft-04) was resolved with two physical/sensory additions integrated into existing prose without bloat. The typo (ch06-craft-05) was a single-character fix. Total new text: approximately 12 sentences across 5 insertion points. No continuity contradictions introduced. Heading contract preserved. Character voice signatures maintained. No sanitization — the revision strengthened rawness at both emotional peaks.
